pkgcache.description: Pixelpulse2 is a user interface for analog systems exploration.
notes: Pre Built AppImage, with Build-related changes. Check/Report @ https://github.com/pkgforge-dev/Pixelpulse2-AppImage
Run it with --getudev flag the first time to configure udev rules. It may not detect the board otherwise
To reduce crashes, plug in your device after configuring the udev rule and opening the app
